spec_match.rationale: Sleek simplified visualizer showing layering of hint vs auto stack levels.

interactive.rationale: Perfect programmatic toggling with dynamic text indicators mapping active elements.

edge_cases.rationale: Uses strict programmatic showPopover() try-catch blocks to handle browser incompatibilities safely.

references.rationale: Cites the official ChromeStatus entry tracking page under see also list.

design_system.rationale: Perfect styling adopting consistent button rows, monospace font layers, and border outlines.
